score_notes.coupling: Animation tokens couple to existing component CSS (button-v2.css, dialog-v2.css). v1 cleanup is vague and could open unrelated files. New components are appropriately isolated.
score_notes.debuggability: CSS variables are devtools-friendly. ColorPicker localStorage side-effect is opaque. data-component only specified for Slider, not ColorPicker/EmptyState. No error instrumentation.
score_notes.surface_area: 5 independent work items across 14+ files + indeterminate v1 inventory. Should be minimum 2-3 distinct lanes. ResolvedTheme type widening affects all theme consumers across packages.
score_notes.testability: Storybook stories required (good). No unit tests, no accessibility tests, no hex validation tests. localStorage recent-colors coupling is untestable without mocking.
score_notes.error_clarity: Zero error states defined for any component. Slider prop validation (min>max, step<=0) unaddressed. ColorPicker invalid hex input has no specified behavior. No @property rules for animation CSS types.
score_notes.reversibility: New components are additive (easy revert). Animation tokens in 3 CSS sections (root, light, dark) + types.ts + resolve.ts + existing component CSS = complex rollback. v1 cleanup with deletions is irreversible.
score_notes.convergence: Missing components + animation tokens align with v2 migration goal. CSS naming inconsistency (--v2-* vs unprefixed --duration-*). ResolvedTheme type mismatch with animation value types.

blocking_findings.finding: Theme type mismatch: ResolvedTheme = Record<ThemeToken, ColorValue> (types.ts:70) is color-only. Animation tokens (durations, cubic-bezier easings) cannot fit in ColorValue which is HexColor | CssVarRef.
blocking_findings.repair: Define DurationValue and EasingValue types. Create a ResolvedAnimationTokens record or add sub-objects (durations, easing) to ResolvedTheme. Do not widen ColorValue.

blocking_findings.finding: Surface area creep: 5 independent work items bundled into 1 lane — animation tokens (5 files), Slider (3 files), ColorPicker (3 files), EmptyState (3 files), v1 cleanup (indeterminate). No runtime dependency between them.
blocking_findings.repair: Split into minimum 3 lanes: (A) Animation token system only (types + CSS vars + resolve), (B) New components (Slider + ColorPicker + EmptyState use same story pattern), (C) v1 cleanup as separate explore task.

blocking_findings.finding: Zero error states defined across all 3 new components. Slider: no validation for min>max or step≤0. ColorPicker: no behavior for invalid hex (#GGG, partial #FF). EmptyState: no icon fallback handling.
blocking_findings.repair: Add error state specification per component: min>max clamping in Slider, aria-invalid for hex input, console.warn for invalid props, @property rules for animation CSS var types in theme.css.

non_blocking_findings.finding: CSS naming inconsistency: v2 uses --v2-* prefix for all tokens. Animation tokens proposed as unprefixed --duration-fast, --ease-*.
Animation tokens applied to existing button-v2.css and dialog-v2.css in same change as token creation.
non_blocking_findings.repair: Split into: (1a) Token system only (additive), (1b) Token adoption in existing components (pure find-and-replace, separate change).

non_blocking_findings.finding: data-component attribute specified only for Slider, not for ColorPicker or EmptyState.
non_blocking_findings.repair: Add data-component="color-picker-v2" and data-component="empty-state-v2" explicitly. State that ALL v2 components follow this convention.

non_blocking_findings.finding: Storybook stories required but no unit/a11y/integration tests for Slider (Kobalte keyboard nav), ColorPicker (hex validation, localStorage), or EmptyState (variant rendering).
non_blocking_findings.repair: Add *.test.tsx files: slider-v2.test.tsx (min/max, orientation, keyboard), color-picker-v2.test.tsx (input validation, recent colors fallback), empty-state-v2.test.tsx (variant rendering, icon fallback).

existing_tokens_affected: packages/ui/src/v2/components/button-v2.css (148 lines, hardcoded transitions could use tokens)
summary: The plan attempts too much in a single lane (5 work items, 14+ files, type system changes, exploratory inventory). Three blocking issues must be resolved: (1) the ResolvedTheme type cannot hold animation values — requires separate type design, (2) surface area must be split into independent lanes, (3) zero error states specified for any component. The CSS naming convention inconsistency (--v2-* vs unprefixed animation vars) and coupling of token creation to existing component edits are significant non-blocking issues. Verdict: REVISE — split into lanes, fix the type mismatch, and add error states before execution.
